summary: Comprehensive testing of AI Sales Intelligence Agent iteration 2 completed successfully. All backend APIs functional with local AI engine implementation. Frontend fully working with varied lead scores, INR formatting, and emerald UI theme. Major refactor successful - local AI handles all features except executive summary.
passed_tests: Backend health check (/api/) returns 200 - API active
Backend /api/leads returns 40 leads with varied scores (11-100, not all 100)
Backend /api/load-sample loads 40 leads successfully
Backend /api/analyze returns comprehensive local AI insights, recommendations, risk alerts, conversion forecast + Gemini executive summary
Backend /api/lead-strategy/{lead_id} returns LOCAL strategy with conversion probability, recommended strategy, communication approach, next actions, talking points, product pitch
Backend /api/outreach/{lead_id} returns LOCAL outreach with subject line, message, call script, channel, timing, follow-up plan
Backend /api/dashboard-stats returns complete statistics
Frontend Dashboard loads with 4 KPI cards showing Total Leads (40), Pipeline Value, Avg Deal Size, Conversion Ready
Frontend Analyze with AI button works - populates executive summary and forecast successfully
Frontend Lead Intelligence table shows 40 leads with varied scores (Score range: 11-100), emerald green score bars visible
Frontend Outreach button works - opens modal with locally generated outreach content instantly (no API delay)
Frontend Lead Strategy Advisor generates strategy instantly when lead selected (local AI)
Frontend Business Insights page shows AI-generated insights after analysis
Frontend Recommendations page shows prioritized local AI recommendations with HIGH/MEDIUM priority levels
Frontend Upload Data page Load Sample Data button works - loads 40 leads
Frontend Enjay Ecosystem page displays 7 Enjay products (Sangam, Samvad, Synapse, Sarathi, WhatsApp, Customer Support, Sales Automation)
All monetary values display INR (₹) format throughout app - found 16+ rupee symbols on dashboard
Emerald green UI theme maintained - 84+ elements with emerald styling
Application never crashes even when testing multiple AI requests - local fallback working
Lead scoring varies correctly (11, 27, 38, 61, 83, 88, 100) - not all leads scored 100
New scoring rules implemented: High=+40, Medium=+25, Low=+10, Deal>300k=+30, Deal>200k=+20, Contact<=7d=+20, <=14d=+10
Local AI engine handles insights, recommendations, risk alerts, strategy, outreach - no external dependencies
Gemini used only for executive summary with graceful local fallback

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All 7 API endpoints working perfectly with local AI implementation
success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All pages load, navigation works, AI features generate content instantly, UI properly styled
